title: RSH Board minutes 2025
body: "The Board meets around 10 times a year.  See the Our Governance pages to find out more about the Board, which was formed when the Regulator of Social Housing became a standalone body on 1 October 2018.  RSH Board minutes from October 2018 and the Audit and Risk Assurance and Nominations and Remuneration committees are also available on the minutes collection page. "

taxons.title: Housing for older and vulnerable people
